scripts.dev:up: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const args=['compose','-f','infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml','up','-d','redis']; const res=spawnSync('docker',args,{stdio:'inherit',shell:process.platform==='win32'}); if(res.error||res.status!==0){console.log('[dev:up] Docker not available, skipping Redis compose.'); console.log('[dev:up] Continue if REDIS_URL is already reachable.');}"
scripts.dev:init: npm run dev:up && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run seed
scripts.dev: npm run dev:up && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
